This directory contains OpenSage web UI assets derived from the Google ADK web
UI assets under `src/google/adk/cli/browser/` in the upstream
`google/adk-python` repository.

The files in this directory are distributed under the Apache License, Version
2.0. See `LICENSE` in this directory and the repository root `LICENSE` file for
details.

OpenSage-specific changes include branding, asset naming, and integration with
the OpenSage web application.
